# Afrowear

> The first magazine dedicated to the full spectrum of Afrocentric fashion — design, culture, craft, and the people driving it forward. Based in Nigeria, serving the global African diaspora.

## About

Afrowear is an inaugural print and digital magazine covering Afrocentric fashion from the inside out: the designers, the weavers, the cultural philosophies behind the cloth, and the global market reshaping African creative industries.

## Issue 01

- Release: Coming 2026
- Focus: Kente and its global transformation, emerging Lagos designers, and a deep look at what "Afrocentric fashion" actually means in 2026.

## Waitlist

- [Join the Waitlist](https://afrowear.world): Reserve your copy and get founding member status. First 500 subscribers receive exclusive early access and a founding member digital badge.
